zh: 计算机存储层次从寄存器到磁盘形成金字塔结构，访问速度递减而容量递增
存储层次设计基于局部性原理，平衡速度、容量和成本
现代计算机采用多级缓存结构弥合CPU与内存之间的速度差距
存储层次包括寄存器、缓存、主存、磁盘和远程存储五个层次
存储层次的有效性依赖于程序访问数据的局部性特征
en: Memory hierarchy forms a pyramid from registers to disk with decreasing speed and increasing capacity
Memory hierarchy design balances speed, capacity, and cost based on locality principles
Modern computers employ multi-level cache to bridge the speed gap between CPU and memory
Memory hierarchy includes five levels: registers, cache, main memory, disk, and remote storage
Effectiveness of memory hierarchy relies on program's data access locality characteristics

zh: 随机存取存储器RAM分为静态SRAM和动态DRAM两大类
SRAM使用触发器存储数据，速度快但集成度低、功耗高
DRAM利用电容电荷存储信息，需要定期刷新防止数据丢失
SRAM主要用于高速缓存，DRAM用于主存储器
新型存储器如MRAM和ReRAM正在挑战传统RAM的地位
en: Random Access Memory is classified into Static RAM and Dynamic RAM
SRAM uses flip-flops for data storage, offering fast speed but low density and high power
DRAM stores information using capacitor charge and requires periodic refresh to prevent data loss
SRAM is mainly used for cache memory while DRAM serves as main memory
Emerging memories like MRAM and ReRAM are challenging traditional RAM positions

zh: DRAM从SDRAM发展到DDR系列，传输速率持续提升
DDR SDRAM采用双倍数据率技术，在时钟上升沿和下降沿都传输数据
DDR4相比DDR3降低了工作电压，提高了数据传输速率和容量
DDR5进一步增加带宽，引入决策反馈均衡技术改善信号完整性
LPDDR专为移动设备设计，在保持性能的同时大幅降低功耗
en: DRAM has evolved from SDRAM to DDR series with continuously improved transfer rates
DDR SDRAM adopts double data rate technology, transferring data on both clock edges
DDR4 reduces operating voltage compared to DDR3 while increasing data rate and capacity
DDR5 further increases bandwidth and introduces decision feedback equalization for signal integrity
LPDDR is designed for mobile devices, significantly reducing power while maintaining performance

zh: DRAM存储单元由一个晶体管和一个电容组成，称为1T1C结构
DRAM芯片按行和列组织成二维阵列，通过行列地址译码访问
DRAM读取操作具有破坏性，需要读后重写恢复数据
刷新操作按行进行，现代DRAM采用分布式刷新策略
DRAM存储体分组设计支持 Bank 级并行访问提高吞吐量
en: DRAM memory cell consists of one transistor and one capacitor, known as 1T1C structure
DRAM chips are organized in 2D arrays of rows and columns, accessed through row and column decoders
DRAM read operation is destructive, requiring write-back to restore data
Refresh operations are performed row by row, with modern DRAM using distributed refresh strategy
DRAM bank grouping design supports bank-level parallel access to improve throughput

zh: Cache利用程序的时间局部性和空间局部性加速内存访问
CPU访问Cache命中时可直接获取数据， miss时需要从主存加载
Cache命中率是衡量缓存效率的关键指标，现代处理器可达95%以上
Cache行是数据交换的基本单位，通常为32字节到128字节
写策略决定Cache修改后如何与主存同步，包括写直达和写回两种方式
en: Cache exploits temporal and spatial locality to accelerate memory access
CPU obtains data directly on cache hit, while miss requires loading from main memory
Cache hit rate is a key metric for cache efficiency, reaching over 95% in modern processors
Cache line is the basic unit of data transfer, typically 32 to 128 bytes
Write policy determines how cache modifications synchronize with main memory: write-through and write-back

zh: 直接映射方式中每个主存块只能映射到唯一的Cache行
全相联映射允许主存块存放在任意Cache行，灵活性最高
组相联映射将Cache分成若干组，主存块映射到组内任意行
直接映射实现简单但容易发生冲突，组相联是折中方案
增加相联度可降低冲突失效，但会增加访问延迟和硬件复杂度
en: In direct mapping, each memory block maps to exactly one cache line
Fully associative mapping allows memory blocks to be placed in any cache line with maximum flexibility
Set-associative mapping divides cache into sets, mapping memory blocks to any line within a set
Direct mapping is simple but prone to conflicts; set-associative provides a compromise
Increasing associativity reduces conflict misses but increases access latency and hardware complexity

zh: LRU算法替换最近最少使用的Cache行，命中率较高
FIFO算法按先进先出原则替换最早进入Cache的块
随机替换算法实现简单，无需记录访问历史
LFU算法根据访问频率选择替换对象，适合特定访问模式
伪LRU用硬件友好的近似方法实现接近LRU的性能
en: LRU algorithm replaces the least recently used cache line with higher hit rates
FIFO algorithm replaces the earliest entered block following first-in-first-out principle
Random replacement is simple to implement without tracking access history
LFU algorithm selects replacement based on access frequency for specific patterns
Pseudo-LRU uses hardware-friendly approximation to achieve near-LRU performance

zh: 现代处理器采用L1、L2、L3三级缓存结构平衡速度与容量
L1 Cache分为指令缓存和数据缓存，支持并行访问
L2 Cache作为L1的后备存储，容量更大但延迟更高
L3 Cache被多个核心共享，减少多核间的数据重复存储
多级Cache设计需要权衡各级的大小、延迟和功耗
en: Modern processors use L1, L2, L3 three-level cache to balance speed and capacity
L1 cache is split into instruction and data caches supporting parallel access
L2 cache serves as backup storage for L1 with larger capacity but higher latency
L3 cache is shared among multiple cores, reducing duplicate data storage
Multi-level cache design requires trade-offs in size, latency, and power for each level

zh: Cache失效分为强制失效、容量失效和冲突失效三类
平均内存访问时间等于命中时间加上失效率乘以失效惩罚
降低失效率可通过增大Cache容量或提高相联度实现
减少失效惩罚采用关键字优先和让读优先于写的技术
预取技术可在实际需要前将数据加载到Cache中
en: Cache misses are classified as compulsory, capacity, and conflict misses
Average memory access time equals hit time plus miss rate times miss penalty
Reducing miss rate can be achieved by increasing cache size or associativity
Reducing miss penalty uses critical word first and read priority over write
Prefetching loads data into cache before actual need

zh: 虚拟存储使程序使用比物理内存更大的地址空间
虚拟地址通过地址转换映射到物理地址，对程序员透明
分页将虚拟地址空间和物理内存划分为固定大小的页框
虚拟存储支持多道程序运行，实现内存保护和共享
缺页异常处理将所需页面从磁盘调入物理内存
en: Virtual memory allows programs to use larger address space than physical memory
Virtual addresses are translated to physical addresses transparently to programmers
Paging divides virtual address space and physical memory into fixed-size frames
Virtual memory supports multiprogramming with memory protection and sharing
Page fault handling brings required pages from disk into physical memory

zh: 页表存储虚拟页到物理页框的映射关系
多级页表将页表分级存储，节省内存空间
TLB是页表的专用高速缓存，加速地址转换
TLB命中时可直接完成地址转换，miss时需查询页表
TLB失效处理需要软件或硬件更新TLB表项
en: Page table stores mapping between virtual pages and physical page frames
Multi-level page tables store mappings hierarchically to save memory
TLB is a dedicated cache for page tables to accelerate address translation
TLB hit allows direct address translation while miss requires page table lookup
TLB miss handling requires software or hardware to update TLB entries

zh: 分段按程序逻辑将地址空间划分为不同段如代码段、数据段
段内连续但段间可以不连续，支持动态增长
段表记录每个段的基地址、长度和属性信息
分段便于实现共享和保护，但可能产生外部碎片
段页式结合分段和分页的优点，是现代系统的主流方案
en: Segmentation divides address space into logical segments like code and data
Segments are contiguous internally but can be discontinuous between segments, supporting dynamic growth
Segment table records base address, length, and attributes for each segment
Segmentation facilitates sharing and protection but may cause external fragmentation
Segmentation-paging combines advantages of both and is the mainstream in modern systems

zh: 内存保护防止进程越界访问或修改其他进程数据
页表项中的保护位控制页面的读写执行权限
地址越界检查时比较偏移量与段长度或页面大小
操作系统通过特权级区分内核态和用户态的访问权限
现代处理器支持NX位防止数据区执行代码
en: Memory protection prevents processes from out-of-bounds access or modifying other processes' data
Protection bits in page table entries control read, write, and execute permissions
Address bounds checking compares offset with segment length or page size
OS distinguishes kernel and user mode access privileges through privilege levels
Modern processors support NX bit to prevent code execution from data regions

zh: 总线是连接计算机各部件的共享传输通路
系统总线包括地址总线、数据总线和控制总线
总线宽度决定了一次能传输的数据位数
总线带宽是单位时间内能传输的最大数据量
同步总线使用时钟信号协调传输，异步总线使用握手信号
en: Bus is a shared transmission path connecting computer components
System bus includes address bus, data bus, and control bus
Bus width determines how many bits can be transferred at once
Bus bandwidth is the maximum data amount transferable per unit time
Synchronous bus uses clock signals for coordination while asynchronous bus uses handshake

zh: 总线仲裁决定哪个主设备获得总线使用权
集中式仲裁由中央仲裁器统一分配总线
分布式仲裁各设备通过优先级逻辑自行裁决
菊花链仲裁按物理位置顺序确定优先级
公平仲裁算法确保低优先级设备不会饿死
en: Bus arbitration determines which master device obtains bus access rights
Centralized arbitration uses a central arbiter to allocate the bus
Distributed arbitration lets devices resolve priority through logic
Daisy-chain arbitration determines priority by physical position order
Fair arbitration algorithms ensure low-priority devices won't starve

zh: PCIe采用串行点对点连接，通过Lane数扩展带宽
PCIe使用包交换协议，支持热插拔和错误检测
USB是通用串行总线标准，支持多种设备类型
USB采用主从架构，主机控制器管理总线访问
USB3.0引入全双工通信，大幅提升传输速率
en: PCIe uses serial point-to-point connections, expanding bandwidth through lane count
PCIe uses packet-based protocol supporting hot-plug and error detection
USB is a universal serial bus standard supporting various device types
USB adopts master-slave architecture with host controller managing bus access
USB3.0 introduces full-duplex communication significantly improving transfer rates

zh: I/O接口连接外部设备与系统总线，完成信号转换
I/O端口是CPU可直接访问的寄存器，包括数据、状态和控制端口
编址方式分为统一编址和独立编址两种
统一编址将I/O端口映射到内存地址空间
独立编址使用专门的I/O指令访问端口，不占用内存空间
en: I/O interface connects external devices to system bus and performs signal conversion
I/O ports are registers directly accessible by CPU including data, status, and control ports
Addressing methods include memory-mapped and isolated I/O
Memory-mapped I/O maps I/O ports into memory address space
Isolated I/O uses dedicated I/O instructions without occupying memory space

zh: 中断是设备通知CPU的异步机制，需要保存和恢复现场
中断向量表存储各中断源的处理程序入口地址
中断优先级决定多个中断同时发生时的响应顺序
DMA允许外设直接与内存交换数据，无需CPU介入
DMA控制器管理数据传输过程，仅在开始和结束时中断CPU
en: Interrupt is an asynchronous mechanism for devices to notify CPU, requiring context save and restore
Interrupt vector table stores handler entry addresses for each interrupt source
Interrupt priority determines response order when multiple interrupts occur
DMA allows peripherals to exchange data directly with memory without CPU involvement
DMA controller manages data transfer, interrupting CPU only at start and end

zh: 通道是具有独立指令集的专用I/O处理器
字节多路通道轮流为多个低速设备服务
选择通道一次只为一个高速设备服务
数组多路通道结合两者优点，支持成组传输
通道程序控制I/O操作，减轻CPU负担
en: Channel is a dedicated I/O processor with its own instruction set
Byte multiplexor channel serves multiple low-speed devices in turn
Selector channel serves one high-speed device at a time
Block multiplexor channel combines advantages supporting block transfer
Channel programs control I/O operations, reducing CPU burden

zh: 多核处理器将多个CPU核心集成在同一芯片上
多核架构分为同构多核和异构多核两种类型
同构多核各核心功能相同，适合并行任务处理
异构多核组合不同类型核心，优化功耗和性能
多核处理器通过共享或分布式缓存实现数据交换
en: Multi-core processors integrate multiple CPU cores on a single chip
Multi-core architectures are classified as homogeneous and heterogeneous
Homogeneous multi-core has identical cores suitable for parallel task processing
Heterogeneous multi-core combines different core types to optimize power and performance
Multi-core processors exchange data through shared or distributed caches

zh: 缓存一致性确保多核访问同一内存位置时看到相同数据
MESI协议用四种状态标记缓存行：修改、独占、共享、无效
监听协议通过总线监听其他核心的缓存操作
目录协议维护共享数据的位置信息减少总线流量
伪共享是不同核心修改同一缓存行不同字段导致的性能问题
en: Cache coherence ensures multiple cores see consistent data when accessing the same memory
MESI protocol marks cache lines with four states: Modified, Exclusive, Shared, Invalid
Snooping protocols monitor other cores' cache operations through the bus
Directory protocols maintain location information of shared data to reduce bus traffic
False sharing is a performance issue caused by different cores modifying different fields in the same cache line

zh: NUMA架构中每个处理器拥有本地内存，访问远程内存更慢
CC-NUMA通过缓存一致性实现统一地址空间
NUMA需要操作系统考虑内存分配的位置策略
首次接触策略将页面分配到首次访问它的处理器本地
NUMA感知调度将线程绑定到靠近其数据的处理器
en: In NUMA architecture each processor has local memory with slower remote access
CC-NUMA provides unified address space through cache coherence
NUMA requires OS to consider memory placement policies
First-touch policy allocates pages to the local memory of the processor that first accesses them
NUMA-aware scheduling binds threads to processors near their data

zh: 锁用于保护临界区，防止多个线程同时访问共享资源
原子指令如CAS提供硬件级别的同步原语
自旋锁在争用短暂时让线程忙等待避免上下文切换
互斥锁在争用较长时将线程阻塞，节省CPU资源
读写锁区分读操作和写操作，允许多个读者并发
en: Locks protect critical sections preventing multiple threads from accessing shared resources
Atomic instructions like CAS provide hardware-level synchronization primitives
Spin locks let threads busy-wait when contention is brief to avoid context switching
Mutex locks block threads when contention is long, saving CPU resources
Read-write locks distinguish read and write operations, allowing multiple concurrent readers

zh: GPU采用SIMD架构，单条指令同时处理多组数据
GPU拥有大量简单核心，适合数据并行任务
CUDA和OpenCL是主流的GPU编程模型
GPU内存层次包括寄存器、共享内存、全局内存
线程束是GPU调度的基本单位，包含32个线程
en: GPU adopts SIMD architecture where single instruction processes multiple data simultaneously
GPU has numerous simple cores suitable for data-parallel tasks
CUDA and OpenCL are mainstream GPU programming models
GPU memory hierarchy includes registers, shared memory, and global memory
Warp is the basic GPU scheduling unit containing 32 threads

zh: 向量处理器对向量数据执行相同操作，挖掘数据级并行
向量指令同时处理多个元素，减少控制开销
向量长度寄存器控制一次处理的元素数量
向量屏蔽寄存器实现条件执行
现代CPU的SIMD扩展如AVX继承了向量处理思想
en: Vector processors perform same operations on vector data exploiting data-level parallelism
Vector instructions process multiple elements simultaneously reducing control overhead
Vector length register controls number of elements processed at once
Vector mask register enables conditional execution
Modern CPU SIMD extensions like AVX inherit vector processing concepts

zh: 细粒度多线程每周期切换线程隐藏延迟
粗粒度多线程在发生长延迟事件时切换线程
同时多线程SMT允许单个周期发射多线程指令
超线程技术是Intel的SMT实现，一个核心呈现为两个逻辑处理器
多线程提高处理器利用率，但会增加单线程性能开销
en: Fine-grained multithreading switches threads every cycle to hide latency
Coarse-grained multithreading switches threads on long-latency events
Simultaneous multithreading SMT allows issuing instructions from multiple threads per cycle
Hyper-threading is Intel's SMT implementation presenting one core as two logical processors
Multithreading improves processor utilization but adds single-thread performance overhead

zh: 数据流架构按数据可用性驱动计算而非程序计数器
存内计算将计算单元集成到存储器中减少数据移动
神经形态芯片模仿大脑结构，适合AI推理
量子计算利用量子叠加和纠缠实现指数级加速
可重构计算通过FPGA实现硬件功能的动态配置
en: Dataflow architecture drives computation by data availability rather than program counter
Processing-in-memory integrates compute units into memory reducing data movement
Neuromorphic chips mimic brain structures suitable for AI inference
Quantum computing exploits superposition and entanglement for exponential speedup
Reconfigurable computing enables dynamic hardware configuration through FPGA

zh: RISC-V是开源指令集架构，无授权费用
RISC-V采用精简指令集设计，模块化的扩展架构
基本整数指令集RV32I和RV64I是必需的
标准扩展包括乘除法、浮点、原子操作等
RISC-V支持自定义扩展适应特定应用需求
en: RISC-V is an open-source ISA without licensing fees
RISC-V adopts reduced instruction set design with modular extension architecture
Base integer instruction sets RV32I and RV64I are mandatory
Standard extensions include multiply-divide, floating-point, atomic operations
RISC-V supports custom extensions for specific application requirements
